Agaram is a signature residential project in Koyambedu, Chennai, India. It features 6 premium 2BHK apartments across 3 floors with a total built-up area of 7,500 sq.ft on 2,800 sq.ft of land. Aureum is an eco-luxury hospitality destination located at Bopitiya Junction, Colombo, Sri Lanka. Spread across 7 acres with 100,000 sq.ft built-up area, it features 57 guest rooms currently under renovation. The property offers waterfront experiences with sea view rooms and water front chalets accessible via Hamilton Canal, comprehensive watersports facilities, wellness center with spa, gym and Ayurvedic treatments, spacious banquet hall for events, solar panels for energy efficiency, and is SLTDA approved.

Aethrina is a mixed-use development in Thalawathugoda, Sri Lanka, currently in pre-launch phase. The project features 40 spacious 3-bedroom residential units across 10 floors with commercial space. Built on 12,000 sq.ft of land with 68,571 sq.ft built-up area, it's strategically located near Hemas Hospital (0.20 km), iGate College, and Maharagama Railway Station. The project is fully approved and ready for development with excellent connectivity to healthcare, education, and transportation hubs.

Mamer is a premium development project in Luxembourg currently in the planning phase.
